sourcesContent:
import React, { useState, useContext } from 'react'; import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import { AppContext } from '../App'; type ViewMode = 'login' | 'register' | 'confirm'; const Login: React.FC = () => { const navigate = useNavigate(); const { setIsAuthenticated } = useContext(AppContext); const [mode, setMode] = useState('login'); const [email, setEmail] = useState('admin@salya.com'); const [password, setPassword] = useState('admin123'); const [name, setName] = useState(''); const [confirmCode, setConfirmCode] = useState(''); const [showPassword, setShowPassword] = useState(false); const handleLogin = (e: React.FormEvent) => { e.preventDefault(); if (email && password) { setIsAuthenticated(true); navigate('/configuracoes'); } }; const handleRegister = (e: React.FormEvent) => { e.preventDefault(); if (name && email && password) { setMode('confirm'); } }; const handleConfirm = (e: React.FormEvent) => { e.preventDefault(); if (confirmCode) { // Upon confirmation, auto-login or send to login setIsAuthenticated(true); navigate('/configuracoes'); } }; return (
{/* Left Side - Branding */}
payments

SALYA

Gestão Avançada de Salários para Angola

Simplifique as suas operações de RH com conformidade local, cálculos fiscais seguros e relatórios intuitivos concebidos para o mercado angolano.

Luanda, Angola Conformidade V3.2
{/* Right Side - Forms */}
payments

SALYA

{mode === 'login' && ( <>

Bem-vindo de volta

Introduza as suas credenciais para aceder ao painel

mail
setEmail(e.target.value)} className="w-full pl-10 pr-4 py-3.5 bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800 border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:border-primary outline-none transition-all dark:text-white" placeholder="seunome@empresa.ao" required />
lock
setPassword(e.target.value)} className="w-full pl-10 pr-12 py-3.5 bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800 border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:border-primary outline-none transition-all dark:text-white" placeholder="••••••••" required />

Ainda não possui conta?{' '}

)} {mode === 'register' && ( <>

Criar Conta

Registe-se para aceder ao sistema

person
setName(e.target.value)} className="w-full pl-10 pr-4 py-3.5 bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800 border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:border-primary outline-none transition-all dark:text-white" placeholder="Seu nome" required />
mail
setEmail(e.target.value)} className="w-full pl-10 pr-4 py-3.5 bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800 border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:border-primary outline-none transition-all dark:text-white" placeholder="seunome@empresa.ao" required />
lock
setPassword(e.target.value)} className="w-full pl-10 pr-12 py-3.5 bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800 border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:border-primary outline-none transition-all dark:text-white" placeholder="••••••••" required />

Já possui conta?{' '}

)} {mode === 'confirm' && ( <>

Confirme a sua conta

Enviámos um código de confirmação para o seu email ({email})

pin
setConfirmCode(e.target.value)} className="w-full pl-10 pr-4 py-3.5 bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800 border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:border-primary outline-none transition-all dark:text-white tracking-widest font-mono" placeholder="000000" required />

)}
© 2026 SALYA. Todos os direitos reservados.
); }; export default Login;
